name: 道の駅 子守唄の里 五木
desc: 五木村の自然と歴史を育んできた場所にある道の駅。特産品を揃えた物産館や温泉館、茅葺き古民家のある子守唄公園を併設。特産の柑橘「くねぶ」の加工品も人気。
descEn: Set in a place shaped by Itsuki Village's nature and history. Has a specialty market, a hot spring facility, and Komoriuta Park with a thatched-roof farmhouse. Processed goods made from the local kunebu citrus are also popular.
